title: allium × cepiforme
intro: Allium × cepiforme, also known as the Welsh onion, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Allium family, characterized by its onion-like flavor and garlic-like aroma. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Allium × cepiforme include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed fresh or dried, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
